rows.title: Senso-ji Temple
rows.notes: Stand at the edge of the Hozomon Gate just before sunset for stunning photographs.
rows.planning_note: Start here for your first afternoon in Tokyo — explore early for quieter experience.

rows.title: Traditional Japanese Tea Ceremony in Asakusa
rows.notes: Sit on the tatami mat facing the window for serene views of the garden.
rows.planning_note: This tea ceremony allows you to unwind and adjust to local customs.

rows.title: Dinner at Asakusa Imahan
rows.notes: Known for sukiyaki hot pot, located near Senso-ji Temple.
rows.planning_note: Try the sukiyaki hot pot — a specialty near Senso-ji, concluding your day in Asakusa.

rows.title: Meiji Jingu Shrine
rows.notes: Approach from the southwestern entrance through a peaceful bamboo grove.
rows.planning_note: Start your day surrounded by nature; pairs with a nearby park visit.

rows.title: Yoyogi Park
rows.notes: Visit the northern edge for a tranquil pond, perfect for sunset reflections.
rows.planning_note: Informal stroll; contrast to the shrine and leads nicely into lunch.

rows.title: Lunch at bills Omotesando
rows.notes: Famous for its ricotta hotcakes and great views from the terrace.
rows.planning_note: Have the ricotta hotcakes; lively area to fuel your Shibuya exploration.

rows.title: Walk to Shibuya
rows.notes: Short walk connecting Harajuku and Shibuya through pleasant city paths.

rows.title: Shibuya Crossing
rows.notes: View from the small pedestrian bridge for a fully capturing scene of the crossing.
rows.planning_note: Immerse yourself in Shibuya's pulse, perfect time for a pre-dinner walk.

rows.title: Dinner at Jidoriya Kappo Sou
rows.notes: A hidden gem for yakitori, offering a tranquil dining experience in bustling Shibuya.
rows.planning_note: Try yakitori — embrace local flavors; a fine close to your Shibuya day.

days.day_title: Cultural Day in Ueno and Yanaka

rows.title: Ueno Park during Cherry Blossom Season
rows.notes: Visit the north side for quiet cherry blossom views against Tokyo's architecture.
rows.planning_note: Take a leisurely morning walk; blossoms are best seen earlier in the day.

rows.title: Lunch at Innsyoutei
rows.notes: Traditional Japanese dining surrounded by seasonal gardens.
rows.planning_note: Enjoy a set lunch, refreshing after the park — aligns with next activity.

rows.title: Walk to Yanaka
rows.notes: A short stroll connecting Ueno Park and Yanaka for an artistic transition.

rows.title: Anko Making Workshop in Yanaka
rows.notes: Complete your day with an anko cooking class, learning Japanese sweet-making traditions.
rows.planning_note: Transition to a hands-on cultural class, divergent yet enriching afternoon.

rows.title: Dinner at Kayaba Coffee
rows.notes: A Yanaka classic, known for its retro feel and high-quality katsu sandwiches.
rows.planning_note: Try the katsu sandwiches — perfect end in charming Yanaka.

days.day_title: A Day with Ghibli and Mitaka

rows.title: Ghibli Museum
rows.notes: Experience the enchanting Ghibli narrative in a quieter setting on the second floor.
rows.planning_note: Arrive early to beat the crowd and maximize your time at exhibits.

rows.title: Lunch at Satou
rows.notes: Known in Mitaka for delicious croquette and tonkatsu.
rows.planning_note: Enjoy a tonkatsu meal — sustenance post museum; pre-park idyllic fit.

rows.title: Inokashira Park Stroll
rows.notes: Explore by the pond's northeast shore for serene vistas.
rows.planning_note: Perfect place for reflective stroll after cultural immersion.

rows.title: Dinner at Harmonica Yokocho
rows.notes: Enjoy an izakaya-style dining perfectly suited for Mitaka's night ambiance.
rows.planning_note: Savor izakaya style — fits Mitaka's character, closing the day's theme.

rows.title: Tsukiji Outer Market
rows.notes: Explore back alleys for exceptional grilled seafood skewers.
rows.planning_note: Early visit guarantees seeing freshest produce and avoiding later crowds.

rows.title: Walk to Ginza
rows.notes: A leisure walk from Tsukiji to Ginza offers a perfect transition to high-end shopping and architecture.

rows.title: Kabuki Performance at Kabukiza Theatre
rows.notes: Opt for a seat facing the stage directly for full appreciation of costumes and makeup.
rows.planning_note: Aligns with afternoon — immediate head to theatre from market enhances cultural segue.

rows.title: Lunch at Sushi Dai
rows.notes: Known for the omakase sushi experience near Tsukiji.
rows.planning_note: Fresh sushi post-cabuki aligns timing and continues seafood journey.

rows.title: Kura Sushi Ginza
rows.notes: Sit at the counter to enjoy seasonal nigiri express options.
rows.planning_note: Late sushi snack rounds out Ginza tour, preview of evening's elegance.

rows.title: Dinner at Bar High Five
rows.notes: Enjoy custom cocktails and the view of Ginza's evening lights.
rows.planning_note: Perfect nighttime end, sip cocktails while embracing Ginza's vibrant after-dark scene.

rows.title: Breakfast at Tsukiji Kagura
rows.notes: Renowned for traditional Japanese breakfast sets.
rows.planning_note: Finish with a filling breakfast to energize for travels back home.
